devstral.Description: Mistral's 24B dense coder. Smaller / faster than the Qwen MoEs; broad MCP tool access (LimitTools=false). Good when you want speed over depth.
devstral.ParserNote: Parser=none is intentional: devstral-small-2's GGUF template self-declares persona, [SYSTEM_PROMPT]/[TOOL_CALLS] tags, and capabilities=[completion,vision,tools]. Adding our own renderer would double-template.

ContextNotes.deep: 64k · same as default; kept for menu symmetry.

qcoder30.Description: Qwen3-Coder MoE (30B total / 3B active, 48L, 4 KV heads). Heretic-abliterated for refusal removal. Native 256k context. The 256k-on-a-4090 pick when paired with iq4xs and -Q8 OFF.

QuantNotes.iq4xs: IQ4_XS · use this for -Ctx 256. Slight quality dip vs q4 but leaves the most headroom for KV cache.
QuantNotes.q4: Q4_K_M · sweet spot for 32k–128k context on 24 GB. Default daily driver.
QuantNotes.q6: Q6_K · highest quality. Big enough that long-context KV stops fitting on a 24 GB card.
QuantNotes.iq1s: IQ1_S · 1-bit imatrix · ~6.4 GB · for the desperate
QuantNotes.iq2m: IQ2_M · 2-bit imatrix · ~10.2 GB · low quality, long-context only
QuantNotes.iq2xs: IQ2_XS · 2-bit imatrix · ~9.1 GB · very low quality
QuantNotes.iq2xxs: IQ2_XXS · 2-bit imatrix · ~8.2 GB · very low quality
QuantNotes.q2k: Q2_K · 2-bit k-quant · ~11.3 GB · IQ3_XXS often better
QuantNotes.q2ks: Q2_K_S · 2-bit k-quant small · ~10.5 GB · very low quality
QuantNotes.q3kl: Q3_K_L · 3-bit k-quant large · ~15.9 GB · IQ3_M often better
QuantNotes.q3km: Q3_K_M · 3-bit k-quant medium · ~14.7 GB · IQ3_S often better
QuantNotes.q3ks: Q3_K_S · 3-bit k-quant small · ~13.3 GB · IQ3_XS often better
QuantNotes.q40: Q4_0 · 4-bit legacy · ~17.4 GB · fast, low quality
QuantNotes.q4ks: Q4_K_S · 4-bit k-quant small · ~17.5 GB · optimal size/speed/quality
QuantNotes.q5km: Q5_K_M · 5-bit k-quant medium · ~21.7 GB · noticeable quality bump
QuantNotes.q5ks: Q5_K_S · 5-bit k-quant small · ~21.1 GB · noticeable quality bump

ContextNotes.deep: 64k · same as default; kept for menu symmetry.
ContextNotes.128: 131k tokens · prefer iq4xs; -Q8 still fits but tight.
ContextNotes.256: 262k tokens · REQUIRES -Quant iq4xs and -Q8 OFF (q8 KV @256k ≈ 12 GB → OOM on a 4090). Default q4_0 KV ≈ 6 GB.

qcodernext.Description: Next-gen Qwen coder: 80B total / 3B active, hybrid Gated DeltaNet + Attention (2 KV heads), native 256k context. Only IQ1_M fits a single 4090 — quality is noticeably below qcoder30. Treat as experimental.

QuantNotes.iq1m: IQ1_M · the only quant that fits a 24 GB card with any KV headroom. Quality is the lowest tier — mradermacher labels IQ1 'for the desperate'.
QuantNotes.iq2s: IQ2_S · fills 24 GB; leaves no room for KV unless you partial-offload.
QuantNotes.iq3xxs: IQ3_XXS · partial offload territory on anything under ~36 GB. Expect single-digit tok/s.
QuantNotes.iq1s: IQ1_S · 1-bit imatrix · ~16.2 GB · for the desperate
QuantNotes.iq2m: IQ2_M · 2-bit imatrix · ~26.1 GB · low quality, long-context only
QuantNotes.iq2xs: IQ2_XS · 2-bit imatrix · ~23.4 GB · very low quality
QuantNotes.iq2xxs: IQ2_XXS · 2-bit imatrix · ~21 GB · very low quality
QuantNotes.iq4xs: IQ4_XS · 4-bit imatrix · ~42.6 GB · good 4-bit, smallest 4-bit option
QuantNotes.q2k: Q2_K · 2-bit k-quant · ~29.1 GB · IQ3_XXS often better
QuantNotes.q2ks: Q2_K_S · 2-bit k-quant small · ~27.3 GB · very low quality
QuantNotes.q3kl: Q3_K_L · 3-bit k-quant large · ~41.3 GB · IQ3_M often better
QuantNotes.q3km: Q3_K_M · 3-bit k-quant medium · ~38.3 GB · IQ3_S often better
QuantNotes.q3ks: Q3_K_S · 3-bit k-quant small · ~34.5 GB · IQ3_XS often better
QuantNotes.q40: Q4_0 · 4-bit legacy · ~45.3 GB · fast, low quality
QuantNotes.q4km: Q4_K_M · 4-bit k-quant medium · ~48.5 GB · fast, recommended sweet spot
QuantNotes.q4ks: Q4_K_S · 4-bit k-quant small · ~45.5 GB · optimal size/speed/quality
QuantNotes.q5km: Q5_K_M · 5-bit k-quant medium · ~56.8 GB · noticeable quality bump
QuantNotes.q5ks: Q5_K_S · 5-bit k-quant small · ~55 GB · noticeable quality bump

qcodernext.ParserNote: Parser=qwen3coder is a guess. Qwen3-Coder-Next has a new hybrid DeltaNet+Attention architecture that may need llama.cpp/Ollama support to land before this runs at all. Verify with -Chat first.

ContextNotes: 32k · default. Conservative; raise once you've confirmed this even loads.
ContextNotes.256: 262k native context. Theoretically supported, practically: expect heavy CPU offload of KV. -Q8 forbidden.

q36.Description: Stock Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B (no abliteration). Pulled from the Ollama registry with its own template — known-good baseline for comparing the uncensored variants.
q36.ParserNote: Parser=none is intentional: the official qwen3.6:35b-a3b-q4_K_M registry pull ships with its own template and tool-call config. Adding our own renderer would double-template.

q36hauhau.DisplayName: Qwen 3.6 35B A3B Uncensored HauhauCS Aggressive IQ4_NL
q36hauhau.Description: HauhauCS 'Aggressive' uncensored finetune of Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B. Single IQ4_NL build — no quant switching. More refusal-removed than the 'Balanced' sibling.

q36plus.Description: Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B 'Plus' Wasserstein-merge uncensored. Widest quant selection in the catalog — daily driver for general agent work that isn't strictly coding.

QuantNotes.iq2m: IQ2_M · tiny; rough quality, mainly for very long-context experiments.
QuantNotes.iq4xs: IQ4_XS · best 128k headroom in this model.
QuantNotes.q4kp: Q4_K_P · slightly higher quality than iq4nl.
QuantNotes.q6kp: Q6_K_P · noticeable quality bump; long-context KV gets tight.
QuantNotes.q8: Q8_0 · highest quality; expect partial offload at any real context.

q36heretic.Description: Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B with the 'Heretic' refusal-removal pipeline applied. Same family as q36plus but a different abliteration recipe.

QuantNotes.q4: Q4_K_M · default. Tight on 24 GB at long context.
QuantNotes.q6: Q6_K · noticeable quality bump; expect partial offload on 24 GB.
QuantNotes.q8: Q8_0 · highest quality; partial offload almost everywhere.

q27heretic.Description: Qwen 3.6 27B dense + Heretic abliteration. Smaller / faster than the 35B-A3B variants; runs comfortably on a 4090 at higher quants.

QuantNotes.q4: Q4_K_M · default. Plenty of headroom for long-context KV.
QuantNotes.q6: Q6_K · top quality; long-context KV gets tight on 24 GB.
QuantNotes.q8: Q8_0 · partial offload on most consumer cards.
QuantNotes.q2k: Q2_K · 2-bit k-quant · ~10.7 GB · IQ3_XXS often better
QuantNotes.q3km: Q3_K_M · 3-bit k-quant medium · ~13.3 GB · IQ3_S often better

q27hauhau.Description: Qwen 3.6 27B dense, HauhauCS 'Balanced' uncensored finetune. Less aggressive de-aligner than the 'Aggressive' sibling — keeps more general-knowledge accuracy.

QuantNotes.iq2m: IQ2_M · 2-bit imatrix · ~10 GB · low quality, long-context only

q36opus47abl.Description: Huihui's 'Claude 4.7 Opus-style' abliterated Qwen 3.6 35B. Thinking-trained: ThinkingPolicy=keep routes it directly at Ollama (port 11434), bypassing the no-think proxy.

ContextNotes: 32k · default. Thinking traces cost extra tokens.
